title: ZXBrick Power-Ups
description: Discover the power-ups available in ZXBrick and learn how they can help you complete levels, improve your score, and master the game.
summary: Power-ups add variety to every game, helping you overcome difficult situations while chasing higher scores and faster progression.

sections.heading: Power Up Your Game
paragraphs: Power-ups give you temporary advantages that can help you survive difficult moments, clear levels more efficiently, and improve your score.
Learning when to collect and use each power-up is an important part of mastering ZXBrick.

sections.heading: Using Power-Ups Effectively
paragraphs: Power-ups work best when combined with good paddle control and careful positioning. They should enhance your skills, not replace them.
Take time to learn how each power-up changes the game so you're ready to make the most of every opportunity.
bullets: Collect power-ups whenever they give you an advantage.
Learn how each power-up changes gameplay.
Combine good timing with accurate paddle control.

faq.question: Do power-ups affect progression?
faq.answer: Power-ups help you complete levels, improve your score, and progress through the game more effectively. They also work alongside achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins as part of your overall progression.

featureShowcases.heading: Choose the Right Power-Up
featureShowcases.summary: Every power-up offers a different advantage, helping you tackle challenges in new ways.
body: Power-ups can turn the tide of a difficult level, giving you new opportunities to survive, score more points, or clear bricks more quickly.
As you become more experienced, learning when to collect each power-up becomes an important part of your overall strategy.
bullets: Learn when each one is most useful.
Combine power-ups with good timing and control.

image.caption: Use power-ups wisely to overcome tougher challenges.
